next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/unleash-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record when using a public hostname.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to the CT upstream (http://<ct-ip>:4242).
Log in to Unleash with unleash.admin_user and the vault admin password.
Create backend and frontend API tokens in the Unleash UI (do not use upstream dev tokens).
Keep HDC_UNLEASH_DB_PASSWORD backed up — losing it makes the Postgres volume unrecoverable.
